item.title: Wiifo Children's Tower Stools Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury and Death from Entrapment and Fall Hazards; Imported by Wiifo
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from June 2022 through March of 2026 for about $60.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from June 2022 through March of 2026 for about $60.
item.summary: This recall involves Wiifo-branded children's tower stools. The wooden kitchen tower stools were sold in white, natural and light wood finish, and measure about 18 inches deep, 18 inches wide and 34 inches tall. "Model LT005" printed on label on the underside of the standing platform.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Wiifo Children's Tower Stools.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled tower stools immediately and contact Wiifo for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to destroy the stool by disassembling it and send a photo of the destroyed stool to support@wiifo.net. Consumers should then dispose of the destroyed product.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
